# x-to-zod-docs

> Documentation site for x-to-zod

### API

- `select`: Selects the most specific parser for a given JSON Schema node.
- `parseRef`: Detects and parses external $ref entries in a JSON schema.
Returns ReferenceBuilder for external refs or null for non-refs/internal refs.
- `extractRefs`: Extract all $refs from a schema recursively.
Accepts any value and safely narrows internally.
Useful for dependency analysis.
- `parsePathPattern`: Parse a JSONPath-inspired pattern into compiled segments.
- `matchPath`: Tests whether a resolved schema path matches a glob-style path pattern.
- `clearPathPatternCache`: Clears the internal compiled-pattern cache.
- `SchemaProject`: SchemaProject: Main API for multi-schema projects.
Manages schema registration, validation, dependency analysis, and code generation.
- `BaseBuilder`: BaseBuilder: Abstract base class for all Zod schema builders.
- `BooleanBuilder`: Fluent BooleanBuilder: wraps a Zod boolean schema string and provides chainable methods.
- `NullBuilder`: Fluent NullBuilder: wraps a Zod null schema string and provides chainable methods.
- `ConstBuilder`: Fluent ConstBuilder: wraps a Zod literal schema string and provides chainable methods.
- `EnumBuilder`: Fluent EnumBuilder: wraps a Zod enum schema string and provides chainable methods.
- `NumberBuilder`: Fluent NumberBuilder: wraps a Zod number schema string and provides chainable methods
that delegate to the existing apply* functions.
- `StringBuilder`: Fluent StringBuilder: wraps a Zod string schema string and provides chainable methods.
- `ArrayBuilder`: Fluent ArrayBuilder: wraps a Zod array schema string and provides chainable methods.
- `ObjectBuilder`: Fluent ObjectBuilder: wraps a Zod object schema string and provides chainable methods.
- `AnyBuilder`: Fluent AnyBuilder: represents z.any() schema.
- `NeverBuilder`: Fluent NeverBuilder: represents z.never() schema.
- `UnknownBuilder`: Fluent UnknownBuilder: represents z.unknown() schema.
- `LiteralBuilder`: Fluent LiteralBuilder: represents z.literal() schema.
- `UnionBuilder`: Fluent UnionBuilder: represents z.union() schema.
Accepts multiple schemas and creates a union type.
- `IntersectionBuilder`: Fluent IntersectionBuilder: represents z.intersection() schema.
Accepts two schemas and creates an intersection type.
- `DiscriminatedUnionBuilder`: Fluent DiscriminatedUnionBuilder: represents z.discriminatedUnion() schema.
Accepts a discriminator key and an array of object schemas.
- `TupleBuilder`: Fluent TupleBuilder: represents z.tuple() schema.
Accepts an array of schemas representing tuple items.
- `RecordBuilder`: Fluent RecordBuilder: represents z.
- `ReferenceBuilder`: ReferenceBuilder represents a reference to an external schema in a multi-schema project.
- `VoidBuilder`: VoidBuilder: represents z.void()
- `UndefinedBuilder`: UndefinedBuilder: represents z.undefined()
- `DateBuilder`: DateBuilder: represents z.date() with optional constraints
- `BigIntBuilder`: BigIntBuilder: represents z.bigint() with optional constraints
- `SymbolBuilder`: SymbolBuilder: represents z.symbol()
- `NaNBuilder`: NaNBuilder: represents z.nan()
- `SetBuilder`: SetBuilder: represents z.set() with optional constraints
- `MapBuilder`: MapBuilder: represents z.map() with optional constraints
- `CustomBuilder`: CustomBuilder: represents z.custom() for custom validation
- `PromiseBuilder`: PromiseBuilder: represents z.promise(innerType)
Wraps an inner schema for async value validation
- `LazyBuilder`: LazyBuilder: represents z.lazy(() => schema)
Enables recursive schema definitions
- `FunctionBuilder`: FunctionBuilder: represents z.function()
Supports function signature validation with args and returns
- `CodecBuilder`: CodecBuilder: represents z.codec(inSchema, outSchema)
Enables bidirectional data transformations
- `PreprocessBuilder`: PreprocessBuilder: represents z.preprocess(transformFn, schema)
Transforms data before validation
- `PipeBuilder`: PipeBuilder: represents schema.
- `JsonBuilder`: JsonBuilder: represents z.json()
Validates JSON-encoded strings
- `FileBuilder`: FileBuilder: represents z.file()
Validates file uploads
- `NativeEnumBuilder`: NativeEnumBuilder: represents z.
- `TemplateLiteralBuilder`: TemplateLiteralBuilder: represents z.templateLiteral(parts)
Validates template literal string types
- `XorBuilder`: XorBuilder: represents z.xor(schemas)
Validates exclusive OR - exactly one schema must match
- `KeyofBuilder`: KeyofBuilder: represents z.keyof(objectSchema)
Extracts keys from an object schema as an enum
- `EmailBuilder`: EmailBuilder: represents z.
- `UrlBuilder`: UrlBuilder: represents z.
- `UuidBuilder`: UuidBuilder: represents z.
- `DatetimeBuilder`: DatetimeBuilder: represents z.
- `TimeBuilder`: TimeBuilder: represents z.
- `DurationBuilder`: DurationBuilder: represents z.
- `IpBuilder`: IpBuilder: represents z.
- `Base64Builder`: Base64Builder: represents z.
- `EmojiBuilder`: EmojiBuilder: represents z.
- `CuidBuilder`: CuidBuilder: represents z.
- `UlidBuilder`: UlidBuilder: represents z.
- `NanoidBuilder`: NanoidBuilder: represents z.
- `parse`: Namespace of JSON Schema parser constructors, one per schema kind.
- `build`: The default Zod v4 builder API.
- `buildV3`: Zod v3-compatible builder factory object.
- `buildV4`: Full Zod v4 builder factory object.
- `postProcessors`: A collection of reusable post-processor factory functions.

## Optional

### Types

- `JSONSchema`: Versioned JSON Schema type that resolves to the correct draft or OpenAPI schema
definition based on `Version`.
- `SchemaVersion`: Supported JSON Schema dialect versions and OpenAPI specification versions.
- `TypeValue`: The set of JSON Schema primitive type names recognised by `x-to-zod`.
- `transformer`: A function that transforms or augments a JSON Schema node before it is
handed to a parser.
- `SchemaEntry`: Single schema entry in the registry
- `ProjectSchemaMetadata`: Metadata associated with a schema
- `RefResolution`: Result of resolving a $ref
- `ImportInfo`: Information needed to import an external schema reference
- `DependencyGraph`: Dependency Graph for schema resolution and build ordering
- `BuildResult`: Result of a build operation
- `BuildError`: Build-time error
- `BuildWarning`: Build-time warning
- `ValidationResult`: Validation result for schema project
- `ValidationError`: Validation error
- `ValidationWarning`: Validation warning
- `NameResolver`: Contract for schema name resolution strategy
- `RefResolver`: Contract for reference resolution
- `TypeKind`: Mapped type from builder-factory key to the `Builder` instance it produces.
- `TypeKindOf`: Extracts the concrete `Builder` type for a given `TypeKind` key.
- `V3BuildAPI`: Explicit type for the complete Zod v3 builder factory.
- `V4BuildAPI`: Explicit type for the complete Zod v4 builder factory.
